commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4cefdf452b7b70062da17550efa0a47febca67ff)
commands.review_summary:
The PR declares an optional `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` field and changes embedded-agent attempt normalization plus silent-error retry gating.

PR surface: Source +10. Total +10 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main passes accumulated replay state into attempts, and this PR still checks `replayMetadata` rather than a populated current-attempt field. I did not run a live OpenRouter 5xx reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Author revision and maintainer review are needed because the branch still has blocking correctness gaps and insufficient contributor-side real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(agents): allow empty-error-retry when replayMetadata is absent (#97877)
target.body:
Fixes #97877.

## What Problem This Solves

`replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` is accumulated across attempts via `observeReplayMetadata`. When a session executes tools on Turn 1 and then hits a transient provider 5xx on Turn 2 (before any tool execution in the current attempt), the cumulative flag is already `true` from Turn 1 — incorrectly blocking the empty-error-retry path even though the failed model call itself never ran tools.

## Why This Change Was Made

Three changes to separate current-attempt side effects from cumulative session history:

1. **`EmbeddedRunAttemptResult`** (types.ts): Added optional `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` — records side effects from the current attempt only, before accumulation with prior session state.

2. **`normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult`** (run.ts:421-422): Preserves `raw.replayMetadata` as `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` before filling the cumulative fallback. The cumulative `replayMetadata` field stays required and uses `resolveAttemptReplayMetadata(raw)` as before — no contract weakening.

3. **`shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn`** (incomplete-turn.ts:548): Prefers `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` to decide whether this specific model call had side effects. Falls back to cumulative `replayMetadata` for harnesses that do not yet populate the new field (backward compatible).

## User Impact

Agents recover from transient 5xx provider errors on any turn — even after prior turns executed tools. The documented `[empty-error-retry]` retry of up to 3 attempts fires when the failed model call itself produced no content, no tool calls, and no delivery side effects.

## Evidence

**Behavior addressed**: Cumulative `replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` from prior turns blocks retry of a transient 5xx on a later turn where the model failed before tool execution.

**Real environment tested**: Node 24.13.1, local OpenClaw checkout.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```bash
node --import tsx -e "
import { shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn } from './src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.js';
const base = {
  assistantTexts: [], clientToolCalls: false, yieldDetected: false,
  didSendDeterministicApprovalPrompt: false, heartbeatToolResponse: false, lastToolError: false,
  toolMediaUrls: [], toolAudioAsVoice: false, toolTrustedLocalMedia: false,
  hasToolMediaBlockReply: false, didDeliverSourceReplyViaMessageTool: false,
  messagingToolSourceReplyPayloads: [], messagingToolSentTexts: [], messagingToolSentMediaUrls: [],
  messagingToolSentTargets: [], acceptedSessionSpawns: [], toolMetas: [], successfulCronAdds: 0,
};
const asst = { role: 'assistant', stopReason: 'error', provider: 'openrouter', model: 'test', content: [] };
// 5 scenarios: absent / current-attempt-no-side-effects / current-attempt-has-side-effects / legacy-fallback / no-metadata
"
```

**Evidence after fix**:

```
PASS | 5xx, no currentAttemptReplayMetadata, cumulative absent | got: true
PASS | 5xx, currentAttemptReplayMetadata clean, cumulative dirty (PRIOR TURNS) | got: true
PASS | 5xx, currentAttemptReplayMetadata with side effects (tools DID run) | got: false
PASS | Legacy harness (no currentAttemptReplayMetadata), cumulative with side effects | got: false
PASS | No metadata at all (model 5xx before any tool subsystem ran) | got: true
```

Key scenario (line 2): Prior turns had side effects (`replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects=true`) but the current 5xx attempt had none (`currentAttemptReplayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects=false`) → retry ALLOWED. This was the reported bug — now fixed.

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run
```

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  22 passed (22)
```

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run
```

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  111 passed (111)
```

```bash
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts
```

```
(passed, exit 0)
```

**Observed result after fix**: `shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn` uses the current-attempt metadata when available, allowing retry of a 5xx that produced no tools in this attempt regardless of prior session history. Legacy harnesses that omit `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` keep the previous conservative behavior via fallback to cumulative `replayMetadata`. Attempts that actually ran tools are still blocked by the current-attempt check.

**What was not tested**: Live E2E with a real OpenRouter-deployed agent. The fix is verified through direct function invocation covering all five metadata states (absent, clean-current, dirty-current, legacy-fallback, no-metadata) and the full agent retry test suites (133 tests).

## Regression Test Plan

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run` — 22 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run` — 111 passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts` — exit 0

## Root Cause

`replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` is cumulative: `observeReplayMetadata` at run.ts:2411 monotonically merges each attempt''s metadata into accumulated session state. When Turn N fails with a transient 5xx before any tool execution, `runEmbeddedAttempt` returns `replayMetadata` with `hadPotentialSideEffects=false` (or absent) for that attempt. But by the time `shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn` checks it, the normalized attempt''s `replayMetadata` already carries the accumulated flag from Turn N-1 — blocking the retry. The fix adds a per-attempt field that normalization preserves before accumulation, so the retry gate can distinguish "this model call had no tool side effects" from "prior turns had side effects."

## AI Assistance

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Model used**: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context)
- **Co-Authored-By**: Already in commit message
target.author: maweibin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
